title: DiscoverUpdate
description: DiscoverUpdate is a modpack where you can discover a new world. Fabric
body:
## **No more updates**
## DiscoverUpdate
**Join DiscoverUpdate so you can discover a new world and all of the new things one new Dimension new Biomes and new Mobs. You can also join your friends without paying for server because of Essential mod. The main goal of this modpack is to improve Biomes and how it looks.**

<details>
<summary>All the 191 mods.</summary>
  
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) Made by [Traben](https://modrinth.com/user/Traben).
